features.name: circular wire assignment combinational loop
features.description: Code should include two wire signals that are mutually assigned to each other through intermediate wire nodes, forming a combinational loop with no ultimate driver

features.name: output ports with only mutual cross-assignment as driver
features.description: Code should include two output ports whose only dataflow source is each other — each output is assigned from an intermediate wire that is itself driven solely by the other output, producing an unresolvable combinational cycle
